category_title: Older preschool children expressing specific verbal and emotional concerns about transition
minimal_context: The teacher and student are having an early conversation in the classroom about the upcoming move to a new building.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Today we are going to have a conversation about moving to the new school building.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I am worried about our classroom.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I am looking at all of our materials in here.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Will the globe go? Will the blocks go? Will the tire swing go?

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Today we are going to have a conversation about moving to the new school building.

STUDENT: I am worried about our classroom.

TUTOR: What are you thinking about?

STUDENT: I am looking at all of our materials in here.

TUTOR: We will be moving soon.

STUDENT: Will the globe go? Will the blocks go? Will the tire swing go?

task.content: Early conversations with the children about the move

context.materials: Classroom materials, globe, blocks, tire swing, sticky notes

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Before the move, when thinking about the new building
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Focused on specific elements of the building or classroom materials and worried about the presence or absence of these items in the new building. Asked 'Will the globe go? Will the blocks go? Will the tire swing go?'
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Worried about the presence or absence of these items
related_quotes: Will the globe go? Will the blocks go? Will the tire swing go?
